segments.text: The words of Amos, who was among the herdsmen of Tekoa, which he saw concerning Israel in the days of Uzziah king of Judah and in the days of Jeroboam the son of Joash, king of Israel, two years before the earthquake.
He said:{
Yahweh will roar from Zion, and utter his voice from Jerusalem; and the pastures of the shepherds will mourn, and the top of Carmel will wither.
segments.speaker: Amos

footnotes.text: + 'Yahweh  is God’s proper Name, sometimes rendered  'LORD (all caps) in other translations.

segments.text: Yahweh says:{

For three transgressions of Damascus, yes, for four, I will not turn away its punishment, 
because they have threshed Gilead with threshing instruments of iron;
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: but I will send a fire into the house of Hazael, and it will devour the palaces of Ben Hadad.
segments.speaker: The LORD
The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Yahweh says:{

segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: but I will send a fire on the wall of Gaza, and it will devour its palaces.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will cut off the inhabitant from Ashdod, and him who holds the scepter from Ashkelon; and I will turn my hand against Ekron; and the remnant of the Philistines will perish,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh.
Yahweh says:{

segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: but I will send a fire on the wall of Tyre, and it will devour its palaces.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Yahweh says:{

For three transgressions of Edom, yes, for four, I will not turn away its punishment, 
because he pursued his brother with the sword
and cast off all pity, 
and his anger raged continually, 
and he kept his wrath forever;
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: but I will send a fire on Teman, and it will devour the palaces of Bozrah.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Yahweh says:{

For three transgressions of the children of Ammon, yes, for four, I will not turn away its punishment, 
because they have ripped open the pregnant women of Gilead, 
that they may enlarge their border.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
The LORD

segments.text: and their king will go into captivity, he and his princes together,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh.
